response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not adapted to the pressure of water  
their immune systems are not designed to handle the chemicals in seawater  
the lack of oxygen in water makes it difficult for them to breathe  
the pressure of water can cause their organs to fail  
the body cannot regulate temperature in water  
the environment is not suitable for their survival  
the physical constraints of water make it impossible for them to live there  
the body cannot function properly in the aquatic environment  

Sec. 2  
the human body is not adapted to the conditions of underwater living  
the immune system is not equipped to handle the chemicals in seawater  
the lack of oxygen in water makes it difficult for them to breathe  
the pressure of water can cause their organs to fail  
the body cannot regulate temperature in water  
the environment is not suitable for their survival  
the physical constraints of water make it impossible for them to live there  
the body cannot function properly in the aquatic environment
